/* World War II */ See [[WP:NOTOPINION]].  While different viewpoints can be acknowledged, please provide an atttribution to the person who voices that opinion and a citation. The consensus is that World War II began in 1939.

I have added the name of the co-author of the book cited and clarified how Israel uses the accusation of human shielding to justify civilian casualties.

I have added details about recent scholarship and UN investigations on the attacks on hospitals and other civilian infrastructures justified by Israel as attacks against "human shielding" structures. The scholarship and UN reports demonstrate that the accusation has been used to justify acts which violate the Genocide Convention. Reference added also the the International Criminal Court genocide case.

/* Israeli–Palestinian conflict */ Whether or not someone has argued that no evidence has come to light, that doesn't change the empirical fact that Hamas has used this tactic, publicly, within the past 3 weeks. Why is it even worth noting that people have made the argument about no evidence existing, unless the goal is to establish a confirmation bias? Everyone has the right to their opinion, but not all opinions are equal, appropriate, or even opinions at all when the opposite is verifiable.
